word: G5365 - φιλαργυρία - philargyría - fil-ar-goo-ree'-ah - Love of money

sections.paragraph:
- Original: φιλαργυρία

- Transliteration: Philarguria

- Phonetic: fil-ar-goo-ree'-ah

- Definition:

1. love of money, avarice

- Origin: from G5366

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G5366; avarice: - love of money.
